chapter_title.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ بِمَنْ يُشْبِهُونَ مِمَّنْ مَضَى وَ كَرَاهِيَةِ الْقَوْلِ فِيهِمْ بِالنُّبُوَّةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 53 – Regarding that the Imams<sup>asws</sup> are resembling with the ones from the past and the abhorrence of the speech regarding them<sup>asws</sup> being with the Prophet-hood

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/157)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/157)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّمَا الْوُقُوفُ عَلَيْنَا فِي الْحَلَالِ وَ الْحَرَامِ فَأَمَّا النُّبُوَّةُ فَلَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Al Husayn Bin Abu Al A’ala who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘But rather, the inquiring is to us<sup>asws</sup> regarding the Permissible and the Prohibition, but, as for the Prophet-hood (being for us<sup>asws</sup>), so no (it is not)’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayrfrom al-Husayn ibn abu al-‘Ala’ from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “To refer to us (as the Divine authorities) is valid only in finding the lawful and unlawful matters. To refer to us as prophet-hood is not valid.”
